It will be filled with a custom Morphine Sulfate solution, concentration to be determined by the attending physician. The primary usage instruction is that the device is programmed by a healthcare professional to deliver a continuous basal rate and allows for patient-controlled analgesia (PCA) boluses within prescribed limits. Patients must be monitored for respiratory depression and other side effects. The reservoir needs refilling every 3 months via a subcutaneous port. We also need to mention that any manipulation of the implant site by the patient is strictly prohibited.<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>
